name: SapBw4Hana
description: This Test Connection validates access against the SAP BW/4HANA ABAP catalog tables and basic metadata extraction of InfoAreas and ADSOs.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that we can connect to the underlying SAP HANA database and authenticate with the given credentials.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to SAP HANA. Please validate the host, port, username, and password.

steps.name: GetInfoAreas
steps.description: List InfoAreas from the RSDAREA table in the ABAP schema. InfoAreas are the top-level folder structure in BW/4HANA (mapped to database schemas in OpenMetadata).
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch InfoAreas from RSDAREA. Please validate that the ABAP schema is correct and the user has SELECT privilege on BW catalog tables.

steps.name: GetADSOs
steps.description: List Advanced DataStore Objects (ADSOs) from the RSOADSO table. ADSOs are the primary data storage objects in BW/4HANA (mapped to tables in OpenMetadata).
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch ADSOs from RSOADSO. Please validate the user has SELECT privilege on BW catalog tables.

steps.name: GetCompositeProviders
steps.description: List CompositeProviders from the RSOHCPR table. CompositeProviders are virtual JOIN views over multiple ADSOs (mapped to views in OpenMetadata).
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch CompositeProviders. The RSOHCPR table may not be present if no CompositeProviders are defined.

steps.name: GetBExQueries
steps.description: List BEx Queries from the RSRREPDIR table. BEx Queries are semantic query/reporting objects over ADSOs (mapped to views in the _BEX_QUERIES schema in OpenMetadata).
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch BEx Queries from RSRREPDIR. Please validate that the user has SELECT privilege on BW catalog tables.
